summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of the Agentlar (field agents) Expo/React Native app. 24/24 pytest backend cases pass, covering OTP auth, role enforcement, users CRUD, categories CRUD, orders CRUD with photo limits, status transitions w/ history, admin stats, and _id leak prevention. Frontend mobile UI tested end-to-end for all three roles (admin / agent / warehouse) — login, verify (DEV banner shown), role-based redirect, dashboards, filter chips and order list scoping all work.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use 'boxShadow' (cosmetic, RN-Web only)
Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents (cosmetic)

action_items: (Optional / cosmetic) Replace remaining shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius styles with boxShadow on web, or guard with Platform.select to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.
(Optional) Replace pointerEvents prop usages with style.pointerEvents to silence the deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
CORS is allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True. Browsers will reject cookies; harmless here because auth is a Bearer JWT, but consider tightening origins.
OTP rate-limiting is absent — request-otp can be hammered for any registered phone. Acceptable for DEV, recommend simple per-phone cooldown for production.
JWT secret is committed in /app/backend/.env (acceptable for preview env, must rotate before prod).
No pagination on /api/orders or /api/users (to_list cap 1000/2000) — acceptable for current scale.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested critical flows (login, OTP+dev banner, role-based redirect, admin dashboard with stats, agent own-orders filter, warehouse queue with status filter chips)

seed_data_creation: Created via tests/admin: TEST_Agent +998901111111 (agent), TEST_Warehouse +998902222222 (warehouse), one delivered TEST order. Default admin auto-seeded by backend at +998940634110.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://kolbasa-delivery.preview.emergentagent.com is the public URL used by the app. SMS_PROVIDER=dev: POST /api/auth/request-otp returns dev_code in JSON and the verify screen shows it under [data-testid="dev-code-banner"]. Important testIDs: login-phone-input, login-submit-button, otp-input, dev-code-banner, stat-new/preparing/delivered/agents, quick-users/categories/orders, add-user-button, new-user-name/phone/save-user-button, role-{admin|agent|warehouse}, order-card-{id}. Pytest fixtures auto-create the test agent and warehouse users; rerun safely. Pytest command: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py -v --tb=short --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Verified flows: auth flow (admin OTP → JWT → /me); role enforcement (agent blocked from /api/users and PATCH /orders/.../status with 403); order isolation (agent gets only own orders, warehouse gets all); status transitions append entries to status_history with by_id/by_name; photos validator rejects >2 photos with 422; blocked user cannot request OTP (403); admin cannot self-delete (400); duplicate phone rejected (400); _id never leaks in any response.
